name: Update Linea Pro Firmware For Maropost Commerce Cloud Pick'n Pack
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For your Linea Pro hardware to work on the newest version of iOS you will be required to run the latest version of the Linea Pro firmware for your device."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Important Note:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you are running outdated versions of iOS, you must run the Linea Pro firmware update before upgrading your iOS devices to the latest version."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On your iDevice, navigate to the App Store and install the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ipcsupport/id1015160712", "children": [{"text": "IPCSupport", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " App."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once the app has downloaded, open it."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Firmware", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Auto Update", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the newest firmware update."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This will begin the update to the latest firmware. A warning message will appear to advise against interruption to the installation."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once the firmware update has completed, you can update your iOS devices to the latest version."}]}]
